intro: Goulburn Radiology welcomes referrals from GPs and specialists. We accept all referrals where Medicare is applicable and are committed to timely, high-quality imaging with personalised patient care.

features.title: All Referrals Welcome
features.desc: We accept all referrals where Medicare is applicable, ensuring your patients receive bulk billed care.

features.title: Bulk Billed
features.desc: All eligible services are bulk billed — no out-of-pocket costs for patients with a valid Medicare referral.

features.title: X-Ray & OPG
features.desc: High-quality digital X-ray including OPG (dental/jaw imaging) with reduced radiation exposure.

features.title: Full Ultrasound Suite
features.desc: Obstetric 3D/4D, Musculoskeletal, Vascular/Doppler and General ultrasound available now.

features.title: Electronic Results
features.desc: Patients receive secure, password-protected electronic copies of their imaging results.

features.title: Patient-Centred Care
features.desc: Founded by experienced sonographers who prioritise personalised, high-quality patient care.

steps.title: Write a referral
steps.desc: Use your standard referral form including the patient's details and clinical indication.

steps.title: Give referral to patient
steps.desc: Hand the referral to your patient to bring to us, or arrange for it to be sent directly.

steps.title: Patient books
steps.desc: The patient calls us on 02 4821 4666 to book their appointment. We will provide preparation instructions.

steps.title: Results delivered
steps.desc: Reports are delivered to your nominated contact. Patients also receive secure electronic copies of their images.
